claim: JSDoc.ts contains 113 JSDocTagDefinition.make(...) factory invocations defining canonical tag metadata entries.
TagValue is composed as a union of category sub-unions and finalized with S.toTaggedUnion("_tag") for discriminated decoding.
TagName is a LiteralKit built from the const tagNames tuple containing 113 canonical JSDoc tag names.
ApplicableTo enumerates AST attachment surfaces including function, method, class, interface, module, file, event, and a catch-all any value.
CanonicalJSDocSourceMetadata defines name/url/retrievedAt with URLFromString and DateTimeUtcFromString codecs, and make() materializes URL + DateTime values.
Locked defaults specify a three-tier certainty model: deterministic 1.0, type-system 0.85-0.95, and llm-inferred 0.6-0.85.
Master orchestration defines the phase state machine as P0 -> P1 -> P2 -> P3 -> P4 -> P5 -> P6 -> P7.
Phase completion requires three conditions: declared outputs exist, exit gates pass, and next-phase handoff prompts are created.
P5 rubric enforces MCP tool/resource coverage plus quantitative gates including NL-to-Cypher >= 80 percent, sub-graph p95 <= 200ms, and recall@10 >= 75 percent.
OVERVIEW identifies itself as an LLM bootstrap spec and separates statements into Implemented, Specified, and Conceptual (Greenfield) states.
The fibration architecture document states Grothendieck factoring is already implemented via JSDocTagDefinition.make + mapFields + annotate, with pipeline and MCP work remaining.
validate-jsdoc-exhaustiveness.mjs encodes canonical expectedCounts as jsdoc3:67, tsdoc:25, typescript:25, closure:39, and typedoc:51.
source-tag-snapshots.json uses schemaVersion 1 and records normalized tag snapshots for jsdoc3, tsdoc, typescript, closure, and typedoc source groups.
The script imports canonical-tag-lists.ts and related modules from local ./ paths, while those files are currently under outputs/jsdoc-exhaustiveness-audit/, creating a path mismatch risk.
The knowledge docs index labels the corpus as living documentation and points to architecture/system-architecture.md, which includes a six-phase unified extraction pipeline.
The LLM control strategy defines six extraction stages with per-stage timeouts, a total 4096-token budget allocation, and max concurrency of five requests.
The OWL/SHACL research recommends SHACL for constraint validation plus lightweight OWL/RDFS reasoning for enrichment, and documents targeted reasoning speedups in the 10x-100x range.
Audit summary reports three medium-severity issues as MVP-blocking and estimates 5-8 days of effort for required fixes.
Binary source artifact ontology101.pdf is present and identifies as a 6-page PDF document (version 1.3, about 502K).
Binary ontology_research images are present: a 2048x2048 JPEG (~2.9M) and a 366x488 JPG (~24K), both included in S04 inventory coverage.
